description_long: This fence consists of two robust vertical columns made of stacked rectangular blocks, supporting a central section of evenly spaced vertical black bars. The top of the fence is capped with a row of greenish, moss-textured blocks, adding a touch of color and visual interest. The vertical bars are pointed at the bottom, suggesting a security function and making climbing difficult. The structure appears solid and heavy, likely constructed from concrete or stone for the columns and metal for the bars. The design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements aside from the green top blocks. This type of fence would be suitable for urban environments where both security and durability are priorities.
description: A sturdy fence with stacked block columns, black pointed vertical bars, and a row of greenish top blocks for added visual interest.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the fence, including the green top blocks, stacked columns, and pointed vertical bars.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the fence and the thickness of the columns.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the fence, with the same block and bar arrangement but less color detail on the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the slim profile and stacked block construction.
